THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANKLIN, CHARLES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1594 MARKET ST #209, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94102, STAYED UNTIL OCT-12-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, S/E UNTIL 12-OCT-96. IF DEFT HAS NOT VACATED PREMISES BY 12 -0CT-96, PLT SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE ENTITLED TO WRIT ISSUANCE FOR POSSESSION AND RESTORATION OF PREMISES. PLT SHALL GIVE REASONABLE ACCESS TO DEFT TO FACILITATE DEFT'S MOVING FROM THE PREMISES. SEE JUDGMENT FOR ANY FURTHER STIPULATION.
